tEn: FLUX.1 Kontext: Flow Matching for In-Context Image Generation and Editing in Latent Space
tZh: FLUX.1 Kontext：潜空间上下文图像生成与编辑的流匹配方法
sEn: FLUX.1 Kontext unifies image generation and editing via flow matching, achieving faster generation and better multi-turn consistency.
sZh: FLUX.1 Kontext 通过流匹配统一图像生成与编辑，实现更快的生成速度和更好的多轮一致性。
absEn: We present evaluation results for FLUX.1 Kontext, a generative flow matching model that unifies image generation and editing. The model generates novel output views by incorporating semantic context from text and image inputs. Using a simple sequence concatenation approach, FLUX.1 Kontext handles both local editing and generative in-context tasks within a single unified architecture. Compared to current editing models that exhibit degradation in character consistency and stability across multiple turns, we observe that FLUX.1 Kontext improved preservation of objects and characters, leading to greater robustness in iterative workflows. The model achieves competitive performance with current state-of-the-art systems while delivering significantly faster generation times, enabling interactive applications and rapid prototyping workflows. To validate these improvements, we introduce KontextBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 1026 image-prompt pairs covering five task categories: local editing, global editing, character reference, style reference and text editing. Detailed evaluations show the superior performance of FLUX.1 Kontext in terms of both single-turn quality and multi-turn consistency, setting new standards for unified image processing models.
absZh: 我们展示了FLUX.1 Kontext的评估结果，这是一种生成式流匹配模型，统一了图像生成与编辑。该模型通过整合文本和图像输入的语义上下文，生成新颖的输出视图。采用简单的序列拼接方法，FLUX.1 Kontext在单一统一架构中处理局部编辑和生成式上下文任务。与当前在多轮编辑中表现出角色一致性和稳定性下降的模型相比，我们观察到FLUX.1 Kontext改进了对象和角色的保持，从而在迭代工作流中具有更强的鲁棒性。该模型在实现显著更快的生成时间的同时，达到了与当前最先进系统相竞争的性能，支持交互式应用和快速原型设计工作流。为验证这些改进，我们引入了KontextBench，一个包含1026个图像-提示对的综合基准，涵盖五个任务类别：局部编辑、全局编辑、角色参考、风格参考和文本编辑。详细评估显示，FLUX.1 Kontext在单轮质量和多轮一致性方面均表现出优越性能，为统一图像处理模型设立了新标准。

contrib.en: Unifies image generation and editing in a single flow matching architecture via simple sequence concatenation.
contrib.zh: 通过简单的序列拼接，在单一流匹配架构中统一图像生成与编辑。

contrib.en: Achieves superior character and object consistency across multiple iterative edits, reducing visual drift.
contrib.zh: 在多次迭代编辑中实现卓越的角色与物体一致性，减少视觉漂移。

contrib.en: Delivers significantly faster generation times (3–5 seconds at 1024×1024) enabling interactive applications.
contrib.zh: 显著加快生成速度（1024×1024分辨率下3-5秒），支持交互式应用。

contrib.en: Introduces KontextBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 1026 real-world image-prompt pairs across five task categories.
contrib.zh: 提出KontextBench，包含1026个真实世界图像-提示对，覆盖五个任务类别。

contrib.en: Employs latent adversarial diffusion distillation (LADD) to reduce sampling steps while improving output quality.
contrib.zh: 采用潜在对抗扩散蒸馏（LADD）减少采样步数同时提升输出质量。

contrib.en: Outperforms competing models like GPT-Image-1 in character consistency and speed by up to an order of magnitude.
contrib.zh: 在角色一致性和速度上优于GPT-Image-1等竞品模型，最高快一个数量级。

limits.en: Excessive multi-turn editing can introduce visual artifacts that degrade image quality.
limits.zh: 过度多轮编辑可能引入视觉伪影，降低图像质量。

limits.en: Model occasionally fails to follow instructions accurately, ignoring specific prompt requirements.
limits.zh: 模型偶尔未能准确遵循指令，忽略特定提示要求。

limits.en: Distillation process can introduce visual artifacts impacting output fidelity.
limits.zh: 蒸馏过程可能引入视觉伪影，影响输出保真度。

limits.en: Currently limited to single context image conditioning; extension to multiple images is future work.
limits.zh: 当前仅支持单张上下文图像条件；扩展到多张图像是未来工作。

limits.en: Evaluation focuses on static images; video domain editing is not yet addressed.
limits.zh: 评估聚焦于静态图像；视频域编辑尚未涉及。

items.en: We present evaluation results for FLUX.1 Kontext, a generative flow matching model that unifies image generation and editing. The model generates novel output views by incorporating semantic context from text and image inputs. Using a simple sequence concatenation approach, FLUX.1 Kontext handles both local editing and generative in-context tasks within a single unified architecture. Compared to current editing models that exhibit degradation in character consistency and stability across multiple turns, we observe that FLUX.1 Kontext improved preservation of objects and characters, leading to greater robustness in iterative workflows. The model achieves competitive performance with current state-of-the-art systems while delivering significantly faster generation times, enabling interactive applications and rapid prototyping workflows. To validate these improvements, we introduce KontextBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 1026 image-prompt pairs covering five task categories: local editing, global editing, character reference, style reference and text editing. Detailed evaluations show the superior performance of FLUX.1 Kontext in terms of both single-turn quality and multi-turn consistency, setting new standards for unified image processing models.
items.zh: 我们展示了FLUX.1 Kontext的评估结果，这是一个生成式流匹配模型，统一了图像生成和编辑。该模型通过整合文本和图像输入的语义上下文，生成新颖的输出视图。采用简单的序列拼接方法，FLUX.1 Kontext在单一统一架构中处理局部编辑和生成式上下文任务。与当前在多轮编辑中表现出角色一致性和稳定性下降的编辑模型相比，我们观察到FLUX.1 Kontext改进了对象和角色的保留，从而在迭代工作流中具有更强的鲁棒性。该模型在实现显著更快的生成时间的同时，达到了与当前最先进系统竞争的性能，支持交互式应用和快速原型设计工作流。为了验证这些改进，我们引入了KontextBench，一个包含1026个图像-提示对的综合基准，涵盖五个任务类别：局部编辑、全局编辑、角色参考、风格参考和文本编辑。详细评估显示FLUX.1 Kontext在单轮质量和多轮一致性方面均具有优越性能，为统一图像处理模型设立了新标准。

items.capZh: (a) 使用FLUX.1生成的上下文图像。

items.capEn: (b) Image context from Figure˜1(a): “The bird is now sitting in a bar and enjoying a beer.”
items.capZh: (b) 图1(a)中的图像上下文：“这只鸟现在坐在酒吧里，享受一杯啤酒。”

items.capEn: (c) Image context from Figure˜1(b): “There are now two of these birds.”
items.capZh: (c) 图1(b)中的图像上下文：“现在有两只这样的鸟。”

items.capEn: (e) From Figure˜1(c): “The two bird characters are now sitting in a movie theater.”
items.capZh: (e) 来自图1(c)：“两只鸟角色现在坐在电影院里。”

items.capEn: (f) From Figure˜1(c): “The two bird characters are now grocery shopping.”
items.capZh: (f) 来自图1(c)：“两只鸟角色现在在杂货店购物。”

items.capEn: (g) From Figure˜1(f): “The two bird characters are now celebrating a successful launch.”
items.capZh: (g) 来自图1(f)：“两只鸟角色现在庆祝成功发射。”

items.en: Images are a foundation of modern communication and form the basis for areas as diverse as social media, e-commerce, scientific visualization, entertainment, and memes. As the volume and speed of visual content increases, so does the demand for intuitive but faithful and accurate image editing. Professional and casual users expect tools that preserve fine detail, maintain semantic coherence, and respond to increasingly natural language commands. The advent of large-scale generative models has changed this landscape, enabling purely text-driven image synthesis and modifications that were previously impractical or impossible [11, 17, 41, 42, 40, 2, 12, 49, 21].
items.zh: 图像是现代通信的基础，并构成了社交媒体、电子商务、科学可视化、娱乐和表情包等多样化领域的基础。随着视觉内容数量和速度的增加，对直观但忠实且准确的图像编辑的需求也在增长。专业和普通用户期望工具能够保留细节、保持语义连贯性，并响应日益自然的语言命令。大规模生成模型的出现改变了这一格局，实现了以前不切实际或不可能的纯文本驱动的图像合成和修改[11, 17, 41, 42, 40, 2, 12, 49, 21]。

items.en: Traditional image processing pipelines work by directly manipulating pixel values or by applying geometric and photometric transformations under explicit user control [14, 55]. In contrast, generative processing uses deep learning models and their learned representations to synthesize content that seamlessly fits into the new scene. Two complementary capabilities are central to this paradigm
items.zh: 传统的图像处理流程通过直接操作像素值或在显式用户控制下应用几何和光度变换来工作[14, 55]。相比之下，生成式处理使用深度学习模型及其学习到的表示来合成无缝融入新场景的内容。这一范式有两个互补的能力：

items.en: Local editing. Local, limited modifications that keep the surrounding context intact (e.g. changing the color of a car while preserving the background or replacing the background while keeping the subject in the foreground). Generative inpainting systems such as LaMa [54], Latent Diffusion inpainting [42], RePaint [33], Stable Diffusion Inpainting variants111https://huggingface.co/runwayml/stable-diffusion-inpainting, and FLUX.1 Fill222https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-Fill-dev make such context-aware edits instantaneous; see also Palette [45] and Paint-by-Example [57]. Beyond inpainting, ControlNet [61] enables mask-guided background replacement, while DragGAN [37] offers interactive point-based geometric manipulation.
items.zh: 局部编辑。保持周围上下文不变的局部有限修改（例如，改变汽车颜色同时保留背景，或替换背景同时保留前景主体）。生成式修复系统如LaMa [54]、潜在扩散修复[42]、RePaint [33]、稳定扩散修复变体（https://huggingface.co/runwayml/stable-diffusion-inpainting）和FLUX.1 Fill（https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-Fill-dev）使得这种上下文感知的编辑变得即时；另见Palette [45]和Paint-by-Example [57]。除了修复，ControlNet [61]实现了掩码引导的背景替换，而DragGAN [37]提供了交互式基于点的几何操作。

items.en: Generative editing. Extraction of a visual concept (e.g. a particular figure or logo), followed by its faithful reproduction in new environments, potentially synthesized under a new viewpoint or rendering in a new visual context. Similarly to in-context learning in large language models, where the network learns a task from the examples provided in the prompt without any parameter updates [6], the generator adapts its output to the conditioning context on the fly. This property enables personalization of generative image and video models without the need for finetuning [43] or LoRA training [19, 27, 20]. Early works on such training-free subject-driven image synthesis include IP-Adapter [58] or retrieval-augmented diffusion variants [7, 3].
items.zh: 生成式编辑。提取视觉概念（例如特定图形或标志），然后在新环境中忠实地再现，可能在新视角下合成或在新的视觉上下文中渲染。类似于大型语言模型中的上下文学习，网络从提示中提供的示例中学习任务而无需任何参数更新[6]，生成器即时调整其输出以适应条件上下文。这一特性使得无需微调[43]或LoRA训练[19, 27, 20]即可实现生成式图像和视频模型的个性化。早期关于这种无需训练的主题驱动图像合成的工作包括IP-Adapter [58]或检索增强扩散变体[7, 3]。

items.capEn: (c) “she is now taking a selfie in the streets of Freiburg, it’s a lovely day out.”
items.capZh: (c) “她现在在弗莱堡的街道上自拍，天气很好。”

items.capEn: (d) “it’s now snowing, everything is covered in snow.”
items.capZh: (d) “现在下雪了，一切都被雪覆盖。”

items.en: Recent Advances. InstructPix2Pix [5] and subsequent work [4] demonstrated the promise of synthetic instruction-response pairs for fine-tuning a diffusion model for image editing, while learning-free methods for personalized text-to-image synthesis[13, 43, 24] enable image modification with off-the-shelf, high-performance image generation models [42, 40]. Subsequent instruction-driven editors such as Emu Edit [51], OmniGen [56], HiDream-E1[15] and ICEdit [62] – extend these ideas to refined datasets and model architectures. Huang et al. [20] introduce in-context LoRAs for diffusion transformers on specific tasks, where each task needs to train dedicated LoRA weights. Novel proprietary systems embedded in multimodal LLMs (e.g., GPT-Image[36] and Gemini Native Image Gen [23]) further blur the line between dialog and editing. Generative platforms such as Midjourney[35] and RunwayML[44] integrate these advances into end-to-end creative workflows.
items.zh: 近期进展。InstructPix2Pix [5]及后续工作[4]展示了合成指令-响应对用于微调扩散模型进行图像编辑的前景，而无需学习的方法用于个性化文本到图像合成[13, 43, 24]则允许使用现成的高性能图像生成模型进行图像修改[42, 40]。后续的指令驱动编辑器如Emu Edit [51]、OmniGen [56]、HiDream-E1 [15]和ICEdit [62]将这些思想扩展到精炼的数据集和模型架构。Huang等人[20]引入了针对特定任务的扩散Transformer的上下文LoRA，每个任务需要训练专用的LoRA权重。嵌入多模态大语言模型的新型专有系统（例如GPT-Image [36]和Gemini Native Image Gen [23]）进一步模糊了对话和编辑之间的界限。生成平台如Midjourney [35]和RunwayML [44]将这些进步集成到端到端的创意工作流中。

items.en: Shortcomings of recent approaches. In terms of results, current approaches struggle with three major shortcomings: (i) instruction-based methods trained on synthetic pairs inherit the shortcomings of their generation pipelines, limiting the variety and realism of achievable edits; (ii) maintaining the accurate appearance of characters and objects across multiple edits remains an open problem, hindering story-telling and brand-sensitive applications; (iii) in addition to lower quality compared to denoising-based approaches, autoregressive editing models integrated into large multimodal systems often come with long runtimes that are incompatible with interactive use.
items.zh: 近期方法的缺点。在结果方面，当前方法面临三个主要缺点：(i) 基于指令的方法在合成对上训练，继承了其生成流程的缺点，限制了可实现编辑的多样性和真实性；(ii) 在多轮编辑中保持角色和对象的准确外观仍然是一个开放问题，阻碍了故事讲述和品牌敏感应用；(iii) 除了与基于去噪的方法相比质量较低外，集成到大型多模态系统中的自回归编辑模型通常具有较长的运行时间，与交互式使用不兼容。

items.en: Our Solution. We introduce FLUX.1 Kontext, a flow-based generative image processing model that matches or exceeds the quality of state-of-the-art black-box systems while overcoming the above limitations. FLUX.1 Kontext is a simple flow matching model trained using only a velocity prediction target on a concatenated sequence of context and instruction tokens.
items.zh: 我们的解决方案。我们引入了FLUX.1 Kontext，一个基于流的生成式图像处理模型，其质量匹配或超过最先进的黑盒系统，同时克服了上述限制。FLUX.1 Kontext是一个简单的流匹配模型，仅在上下文和指令令牌的拼接序列上使用速度预测目标进行训练。

items.en: Character consistency: FLUX.1 Kontext excels at character preservation, including multiple, iterative edit turns.
items.zh: 角色一致性：FLUX.1 Kontext在角色保留方面表现出色，包括多次迭代编辑轮次。

items.en: Interactive speed: FLUX.1 Kontext is fast. Both text-to-image and image-to-image application reach speeds for synthesising an image at 1024×10241024\times 1024 of 3–5 seconds.
items.zh: 交互速度：FLUX.1 Kontext 速度很快。文本到图像和图像到图像应用在合成 1024×1024 图像时均能达到 3–5 秒的速度。

items.en: Iterative application: Fast inference and robust consistency allow users to refine an image through multiple successive edits with minimal visual drift.
items.zh: 迭代应用：快速推理和强大的一致性允许用户通过多次连续编辑来细化图像，且视觉漂移极小。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A fused DiT block equipped with rotary positional embeddings
items.capZh: 图 3：配备旋转位置嵌入的融合 DiT 块

items.en: FLUX.1 is a rectified flow transformer [12, 30, 32] trained in the latent space of an image autoencoder [42]. We follow Rombach et al. [42] and train a convolutional autoencoder with an adversarial objective from scratch. By scaling up the training compute and using 16 latent channels, we improve the reconstruction capabilities compared to related models; see Table˜1. Furthermore, FLUX.1 is built from a mix of double stream and single stream [38] blocks. Double stream blocks employ separate weights for image and text tokens, and mixing is done by applying the attention operation over the concatenation of tokens. After passing the sequences through the double stream blocks, we concatenate them and apply 38 single stream blocks to the image and text tokens. Finally, we discard the text tokens and decode the image tokens.
items.zh: FLUX.1 是一个整流流 Transformer [12, 30, 32]，在图像自编码器 [42] 的潜在空间中训练。我们遵循 Rombach 等人 [42] 的方法，从头开始训练一个带有对抗目标的卷积自编码器。通过扩展训练算力并使用 16 个潜在通道，我们相比相关模型提升了重建能力；见表 1。此外，FLUX.1 由双流块和单流块 [38] 混合构建。双流块对图像和文本 token 使用独立的权重，混合通过将注意力机制应用于 token 的拼接来实现。在序列通过双流块后，我们将其拼接并对图像和文本 token 应用 38 个单流块。最后，我们丢弃文本 token 并解码图像 token。

items.en: To improve GPU utilization of single stream blocks, we leverage fused feed-forward blocks inspired by Dehghani et al. [8], which i) reduce the number of modulation parameters in a feedforward block by a factor of 2 and ii) fuse the attention input- and output linear layers with that of the MLP, leading to larger matrix-vector multiplications and thus more efficient training and inference. We utilize factorized three–dimensional Rotary Positional Embeddings (3D RoPE) [53]. Every latent token is indexed by its space-time coordinates (t,h,w)(t,h,w) (with t≡0t\equiv 0 for single image inputs). See Figure˜3 for a visualization.
items.zh: 为了提高单流块的 GPU 利用率，我们利用受 Dehghani 等人 [8] 启发的融合前馈块，该块 (i) 将前馈块中的调制参数数量减少 2 倍，(ii) 将注意力输入和输出线性层与 MLP 融合，从而产生更大的矩阵-向量乘法，进而实现更高效的训练和推理。我们使用分解的三维旋转位置嵌入 (3D RoPE) [53]。每个潜在 token 由其时空坐标 (t,h,w) 索引（对于单图像输入，t≡0）。可视化见图 3。

items.capEn: Figure 4: High-level overview of FLUX.1 Kontext, with input and context image on the left. Details in Section˜3.
items.capZh: 图 4：FLUX.1 Kontext 的高层概览，左侧为输入图像和上下文图像。详见第 3 节。

items.en: Our goal is to learn a model that can generate images conditioned jointly on a text prompt and a reference images. More formally, we aim to approximate the conditional distribution
items.zh: 我们的目标是学习一个模型，该模型能够基于文本提示和参考图像联合生成图像。更正式地说，我们旨在近似条件分布

items.en: where xx is the target image, yy is a context image (or ∅\varnothing), and cc is a natural-language instruction. Unlike classic text-to-image generation, this objective entails learning relations between images themselves, mediated by cc, so that the same network can >i) perform image-driven edits when y≠∅y\neq\varnothing, and (ii) create new content from scratch when y=∅y=\varnothing.
items.zh: 其中 x 是目标图像，y 是上下文图像（或 ∅），c 是自然语言指令。与经典的文本到图像生成不同，此目标涉及学习图像本身之间的关系，由 c 作为中介，使得同一网络能够 (i) 在 y≠∅ 时执行图像驱动的编辑，以及 (ii) 在 y=∅ 时从头创建新内容。

items.en: To that end, let x∈𝒳x\in\mathcal{X} be an output (target) image, y∈𝒳∪{∅}y\in\mathcal{X}\cup\{\varnothing\} an optional context image, and c∈𝒞c\in\mathcal{C} a text prompt. We model the conditional distribution pθ​(x∣y,c)p_{\theta}(x\mid y,c) such that the same network handles in-context and local edits when y≠∅y\neq\varnothing and free text-to-image generation when y=∅y=\varnothing. Training starts from a FLUX.1 text-to-image checkpoint, and we collect and curate millions of relational pairs (x|y,c)(x\,|\,y,c) for optimization. In practice, we do not model images in pixel space but instead encode them into a token sequence as discussed in the following paragraph.
items.zh: 为此，令 x∈𝒳 为输出（目标）图像，y∈𝒳∪{∅} 为可选的上下文图像，c∈𝒞 为文本提示。我们对条件分布 pθ(x∣y,c) 建模，使得同一网络在 y≠∅ 时处理上下文和局部编辑，在 y=∅ 时处理自由文本到图像生成。训练从 FLUX.1 文本到图像检查点开始，我们收集并整理数百万个关系对 (x|y,c) 用于优化。实际上，我们不在像素空间中对图像建模，而是按照下一段所述将其编码为 token 序列。

items.en: Images are encoded into latent tokens by the frozen FLUX auto-encoder. These context image tokens yy are then appended to the image tokens xx and fed into the visual stream of the model. This simple sequence concatenation (i) supports different input/output resolutions and aspect ratios, and (ii) readily extends to multiple images y1,y2,…,yNy_{1},y_{2},\dots,y_{N}. Channel-wise concatenation of xx and yy was also tested but in initial experiments we found this design choice to perform worse.
items.zh: 图像由冻结的 FLUX 自编码器编码为潜在 token。这些上下文图像 token y 随后被附加到图像 token x 上，并输入模型的视觉流。这种简单的序列拼接 (i) 支持不同的输入/输出分辨率和宽高比，(ii) 易于扩展到多个图像 y1,y2,…,yN。我们还测试了 x 和 y 的通道级拼接，但在初步实验中我们发现这种设计选择效果较差。

items.en: We encode positional information via 3D RoPE embeddings, where the embeddings for the context yy receive a constant offset for all context tokens. We treat the offset as a virtual time step that cleanly separates the context and target blocks while leaving their internal spatial structure intact. Concretely, if a token position is denoted by the triplet 𝐮=(t,h,w)\mathbf{u}=(t,h,w), then we set 𝐮x=(0,h,w)\mathbf{u}_{x}=(0,h,w) for the target tokens and for context tokens we set
items.zh: 我们通过 3D RoPE 嵌入编码位置信息，其中上下文 y 的嵌入对所有上下文 token 接收一个常数偏移。我们将该偏移视为一个虚拟时间步，它清晰地将上下文块和目标块分开，同时保持其内部空间结构不变。具体来说，如果 token 位置由三元组 u=(t,h,w) 表示，那么对于目标 token 我们设置 u_x=(0,h,w)，对于上下文 token 我们设置

items.en: We train with a rectified flow–matching loss
items.zh: 我们使用整流流匹配损失进行训练

items.en: where ztz_{t} is the linearly interpolated latent between xx and noise ε∼𝒩​(0,1)\varepsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(0,1); zt=(1−t)​x+t​εz_{t}=(1-t)x+t\varepsilon. We use a logit normal shift schedule (see Section˜A.2) for p​(t;μ,σ=1.0)p(t;\mu,\sigma=1.0), where we change the mode μ\mu depending on the resolution of the data during training. When sampling pure text–image pairs (y=∅y=\varnothing) we omit all tokens yy, preserving the text-to-image generation capability of the model.
items.zh: 其中 z_t 是 x 与噪声 ε∼𝒩(0,1) 之间的线性插值潜在变量；z_t=(1-t)x+tε。我们对 p(t;μ,σ=1.0) 使用对数正态移位调度（见第 A.2 节），其中我们根据训练期间数据的分辨率改变模式 μ。当采样纯文本-图像对 (y=∅) 时，我们省略所有 token y，从而保留模型的文本到图像生成能力。

items.en: Sampling of a flow matching model obtained by optimizing Equation˜3 typically involves solving an ordinary or stochastic differential equation [30, 1], using 50–250 guided [16] network evaluations. While samples obtained through such a procedure are of good quality for a well-trained model vΘv_{\Theta}, this comes with a few potential drawbacks: First, such multi-step sampling is slow, rendering model-serving at scale expensive and hindering low-latency, interactive applications. Moreover, guidance may occasionally introduce visual artifacts such as over-saturated samples. We tackle both challenges using latent adversarial diffusion distillation (LADD) [47, 48, 49], reducing the number of sampling steps while increasing the quality of the samples through adversarial training.
items.zh: 通过优化方程 3 获得的流匹配模型的采样通常涉及求解常微分或随机微分方程 [30, 1]，使用 50–250 次引导 [16] 网络评估。虽然对于训练良好的模型 v_Θ，通过这种过程获得的样本质量良好，但这带来了一些潜在缺点：首先，这种多步采样速度慢，导致大规模模型服务成本高昂，并阻碍低延迟的交互式应用。此外，引导有时可能会引入视觉伪影，例如过饱和样本。我们使用潜在对抗扩散蒸馏 (LADD) [47, 48, 49] 解决这两个挑战，通过对抗训练减少采样步数同时提高样本质量。

items.capEn: (b) “Using this style, a kid on a bicycles rolls through desert ruins, spotlights scanning ancient scrolls projected as holographic sandstorms.”
items.capZh: (b) “使用这种风格，一个骑自行车的小孩穿过沙漠废墟，聚光灯扫描着投射为全息沙尘暴的古代卷轴。”

items.capEn: (c) “Using this style, a grand piano made of shifting mirrors performs itself for an audience of empty velvet chairs in zero-gravity.”
items.capZh: (c) “使用这种风格，一架由移动镜子制成的三角钢琴在零重力下为空天鹅绒椅子的观众自行演奏。”

items.capEn: (d) “Using this style, a spiral of vintage cameras captures its own collapse, each flash freeze-framing a different timeline.”
items.capZh: (d) “使用这种风格，一个由老式相机组成的螺旋捕捉自身的崩塌，每次闪光定格一个不同的时间线。”

items.capEn: (f) “Using this style, a half-folded metropolis hangs from steel strings over an ink-wash ocean while cranes of light sketch new streets in mid-air.”
items.capZh: (f) “使用这种风格，一座半折叠的大都市悬挂在钢索上，下方是水墨海洋，光之起重机在半空中勾勒新街道。”

items.capEn: (g) “Using this style, a dapper octopus conducts a jazz duo of owls on a shimmering moonlit bandstand.”
items.capZh: (g) “使用这种风格，一位时髦的章鱼在月光闪烁的舞台上指挥一支由猫头鹰组成的爵士二重奏。”

items.capEn: (h) “Using this style, a bunny, a dog and a cat are having a tea party seated around a small white table.”
items.capZh: (h) “使用这种风格，一只兔子、一只狗和一只猫围坐在一张白色小桌旁举行茶会。”

items.en: Starting from a pure text-to-image checkpoint, we jointly fine-tune the model on image-to-image and text-to-image tasks following Equation˜3. While our formulation naturally covers multiple input images, we focus on single context images for conditioning at this time. FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] is trained with the flow objective followed by LADD [48]. We obtain FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] through guidance-distillation into a 12B diffusion transformer following the techniques outlined in Meng et al. [34]. To optimize FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] performance on edit tasks, we focus exclusively on image-to-image training, i.e. do not train on the pure text-to-image task for FLUX.1 Kontext [dev]. We incorporate safety training measures including classifier-based filtering and adversarial training to prevent the generation of non-consensual intimate imagery (NCII) and child sexual abuse material (CSAM).
items.zh: 从纯文本到图像检查点开始，我们根据公式3联合微调模型，使其同时处理图像到图像和文本到图像任务。虽然我们的公式自然涵盖了多个输入图像，但目前我们专注于使用单个上下文图像进行条件控制。FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] 使用流目标进行训练，随后采用 LADD [48]。我们通过引导蒸馏，按照 Meng 等人 [34] 中概述的技术，将 FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] 训练成一个 12B 扩散 Transformer。为了优化 FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] 在编辑任务上的性能，我们只专注于图像到图像的训练，即不对 FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] 进行纯文本到图像任务的训练。我们加入了安全训练措施，包括基于分类器的过滤和对抗训练，以防止生成非自愿亲密图像（NCII）和儿童性虐待材料（CSAM）。

items.en: We use FSDP2 [29] with mixed precision: all-gather operations are performed in bfloat16 while gradient reduce-scatter uses float32 for improved numerical stability. We use selective activation checkpointing [26] to reduce maximum VRAM usage. To improve throughput, we use Flash Attention 3 [50] and regional compilation of individual Transformer blocks.
items.zh: 我们使用 FSDP2 [29] 和混合精度：all-gather 操作以 bfloat16 执行，而梯度 reduce-scatter 使用 float32 以提高数值稳定性。我们使用选择性激活检查点 [26] 来减少最大 VRAM 使用量。为了提高吞吐量，我们使用了 Flash Attention 3 [50] 和单个 Transformer 块的区域编译。

items.capEn: (b) “extract only the skirt over a white background, product photography style”
items.capZh: (b) “仅提取白色背景上的裙子，产品摄影风格”

items.capEn: (c) “show me an extreme closeup of the fabric”
items.capZh: (c) “给我看一个面料的极端特写”

items.en: In this section, we evaluate FLUX.1 Kontext’s performance and demonstrate its capabilities. We first introduce KontextBench, a novel benchmark featuring real-world image editing challenges crowd-sourced from users. We then present our primary evaluation: a systematic comparison of FLUX.1 Kontext against state-of-the-art text-to-image and image-to-image synthesis methods, where we demonstrate competitive performance across diverse editing tasks. Finally, we explore FLUX.1 Kontext’s practical applications, including iterative editing workflows, style transfer, visual cue editing, and text editing.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们评估 FLUX.1 Kontext 的性能并展示其能力。我们首先介绍 KontextBench，这是一个新颖的基准测试，包含从用户众包的真实世界图像编辑挑战。然后我们展示主要评估：将 FLUX.1 Kontext 与最先进的文本到图像和图像到图像合成方法进行系统比较，我们在各种编辑任务中展示了具有竞争力的性能。最后，我们探讨 FLUX.1 Kontext 的实际应用，包括迭代编辑工作流、风格迁移、视觉提示编辑和文本编辑。

full.sec: 4.1 KontextBench – Crowd-sourced Real-World Benchmark for In-Context Tasks
full.secZh: 4.1 KontextBench – 众包的真实世界上下文任务基准

items.en: Existing benchmarks for editing models are often limited when it comes to capturing real-world usage. InstructPix2Pix [5] relies on synthetic Stable Diffusion samples and GPT-generated instructions, creating inherent bias. MagicBrush [60], while using authentic MS-COCO images, is constrained by DALLE-2’s [41] capabilities during data collection. Other benchmarks like Emu-Edit [51] use lower-resolution images with unrealistic distributions and focus solely on editing tasks, while DreamBench [39] lacks broad coverage and GEdit-bench [31] does not represent the full scope of modern multimodal models. IntelligentBench [9] remains unavailable with only 300 examples of uncertain task coverage.
items.zh: 现有的编辑模型基准测试在捕捉真实世界使用情况方面往往有限。InstructPix2Pix [5] 依赖于合成的 Stable Diffusion 样本和 GPT 生成的指令，存在固有偏差。MagicBrush [60] 虽然使用真实的 MS-COCO 图像，但在数据收集过程中受到 DALLE-2 [41] 能力的限制。其他基准测试如 Emu-Edit [51] 使用分辨率较低且分布不真实的图像，仅关注编辑任务，而 DreamBench [39] 缺乏广泛覆盖，GEdit-bench [31] 不能代表现代多模态模型的全部范围。IntelligentBench [9] 仍然不可用，仅有 300 个示例，任务覆盖不确定。

items.en: To address these gaps, we compile KontextBench from crowd-sourced real-world use cases. The benchmark comprises 10261026 unique image-prompt pairs derived from 108 base images including personal photos, CC-licensed art, public domain images, and AI-generated content. It spans five core tasks: local instruction editing (416 examples), global instruction editing (262), text editing (92), style reference (63), and character reference (193). We found that the scale of the benchmark provides a good balance between reliable human evaluation and comprehensive coverage of real-world applications. We will publish this benchmark including the samples of FLUX.1 Kontext and all reported baselines.
items.zh: 为了弥补这些差距，我们从众包的真实世界用例中编译了 KontextBench。该基准测试包含 1026 个独特的图像-提示对，源自 108 张基础图像，包括个人照片、CC 许可的艺术作品、公共领域图像和 AI 生成的内容。它涵盖五个核心任务：局部指令编辑（416 个示例）、全局指令编辑（262 个）、文本编辑（92 个）、风格参考（63 个）和角色参考（193 个）。我们发现基准测试的规模在可靠的人工评估和真实世界应用的全面覆盖之间取得了良好的平衡。我们将发布这个基准测试，包括 FLUX.1 Kontext 的样本和所有报告的基线。

items.en: FLUX.1 Kontext is designed to perform both text-to-image (T2I) and image-to-image (I2I) synthesis. We evaluate our approach against the strongest proprietary and open-weight models in both domains. We evaluate FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] and [dev]. As stated above, for [dev] we exclusively focus on image-to-image tasks. Additionally, we introduce FLUX.1 Kontext [max], which uses more compute to improve generative performance.
items.zh: FLUX.1 Kontext 旨在执行文本到图像（T2I）和图像到图像（I2I）合成。我们评估了我们的方法在两个领域中最强的专有和开源模型。我们评估了 FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] 和 [dev]。如上所述，对于 [dev]，我们只专注于图像到图像任务。此外，我们引入了 FLUX.1 Kontext [max]，它使用更多算力来提高生成性能。

items.en: Image-to-Image Results. For image editing evaluation, we assess performance across multiple editing tasks: image quality, local editing, character reference (CREF), style reference (SREF), text editing, and computational efficiency. CREF enables consistent generation of specific characters or objects across novel settings, whereas SREF allows style transfer from reference images while maintaining semantic control. We compare different APIs and find that our models offer the fastest latency (cf. Figure˜7(b)), outperforming related models by up to an order of magnitude in speed difference. In our human evaluation (Figure˜8), we find that FLUX.1 Kontext [max] and [pro] are the best solution in the categories local and text editing, and for general CREF. We also calculate quantitative scores for CREF, to asses changes in facial characteristics between input and output images we use AuraFace555https://huggingface.co/fal/AuraFace-v1 to extract facial embeddings before and after and edit and compare both, see Figure˜8(f). In alignment with our human evaluations, FLUX.1 Kontext outperforms all other models. For global editing and SREF, FLUX.1 Kontext is second only to gpt-image-1, and Gen-4 References, respectively.
items.zh: 图像到图像结果。对于图像编辑评估，我们评估了多个编辑任务的性能：图像质量、局部编辑、角色参考（CREF）、风格参考（SREF）、文本编辑和计算效率。CREF 能够在新的设置中一致地生成特定角色或对象，而 SREF 允许从参考图像进行风格迁移，同时保持语义控制。我们比较了不同的 API，发现我们的模型提供了最快的延迟（参见图 7(b)），在速度上比相关模型快一个数量级。在我们的主观评估（图 8）中，我们发现 FLUX.1 Kontext [max] 和 [pro] 在局部编辑、文本编辑和一般 CREF 类别中是最佳解决方案。我们还计算了 CREF 的定量分数，为了评估输入和输出图像之间面部特征的变化，我们使用 AuraFace（https://huggingface.co/fal/AuraFace-v1）在编辑前后提取面部嵌入并进行比较，参见图 8(f)。与我们的主观评估一致，FLUX.1 Kontext 优于所有其他模型。对于全局编辑和 SREF，FLUX.1 Kontext 分别仅次于 gpt-image-1 和 Gen-4 References。

items.en: Overall, FLUX.1 Kontext offers state-of-the-art character consistency, and editing capabilities, while outperforming competing models such as GPT-Image-1 by up to an order of magnitude in speed.
items.zh: 总体而言，FLUX.1 Kontext 提供了最先进的角色一致性和编辑能力，同时在速度上比 GPT-Image-1 等竞争模型快一个数量级。

items.en: Text-to-Image Results. Current T2I benchmarks predominantly focus on general preference, typically asking questions like “which image do you prefer?”. We observe that this broad evaluation criterion often favors a characteristic “AI aesthetic” meaning over-saturated colors, excessive focus on central subjects, pronounced bokeh effects, and convergence toward homogeneous styles. We term this phenomenon bakeyness. To address this limitation, we decompose T2I evaluation into five distinct dimensions: prompt following, aesthetic (“which image do you find more aesthetically pleasing”), realism (“which image looks more real”), typography accuracy, and inference speed. We evaluate on 1 000 diverse test prompts compiled from academic benchmarks (DrawBench [46], PartiPrompts [59]) and real user queries. We refer to this benchmark as Internal-T2I-Bench in the following. In addition, we complement this benchmark with additional evaluations on GenAI bench [28].
items.zh: 文本到图像结果。当前的 T2I 基准测试主要关注一般偏好，通常问“你更喜欢哪张图像？”这样的问题。我们观察到，这种宽泛的评估标准往往偏爱一种特征性的“AI 美学”，即过度饱和的颜色、过度关注中心主体、明显的散景效果以及趋同于同质化风格。我们将这种现象称为“烘焙度”（bakeyness）。为了解决这一局限性，我们将 T2I 评估分解为五个不同的维度：提示遵循、美学（“你觉得哪张图像更美观”）、真实感（“哪张图像看起来更真实”）、排版准确性和推理速度。我们在 1000 个多样化的测试提示上进行了评估，这些提示来自学术基准测试（DrawBench [46]、PartiPrompts [59]）和真实用户查询。我们在下文中将此基准测试称为 Internal-T2I-Bench。此外，我们还在 GenAI bench [28] 上进行了额外评估来补充此基准测试。

items.en: In T2I, FLUX.1 Kontext demonstrates balanced performance across evaluation categories (see Figure˜9). Although competing models excel in certain domains, this often comes at the expense of other categories. For instance, Recraft delivers strong aesthetic quality but limited prompt adherence, whereas GPT-Image-1 shows the inverse overall performance pattern. FLUX.1 Kontext consistently improves performance across categories over its predecessor FLUX1.1 [pro]. We also observe progressive gains from FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] to FLUX.1 Kontext [max]. We highlight samples in Fig. 14.
items.zh: 在 T2I 中，FLUX.1 Kontext 在评估类别中表现出均衡的性能（见图 9）。虽然竞争模型在某些领域表现出色，但这往往以牺牲其他类别为代价。例如，Recraft 提供了强大的美学质量，但提示遵循有限，而 GPT-Image-1 则表现出相反的整体性能模式。FLUX.1 Kontext 在其前身 FLUX1.1 [pro] 的基础上，在各个类别中持续改进性能。我们还观察到从 FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] 到 FLUX.1 Kontext [max] 的渐进式提升。我们在图 14 中展示了样本。

items.capZh: (a) 美学 (内部 T2I 基准)
(b) 提示遵循 (内部 T2I 基准)
(c) 排版 (内部 T2I 基准)
(d) 真实感 (内部 T2I 基准)

items.en: Maintaining character and object consistency across multiple edits is crucial for brand-sensitive and storytelling applications. Current state-of-the-art approaches suffer from noticeable visual drift: characters lose identity and objects lose defining features with each edit. In Fig. 12, we demonstrate character identity drift across edit sequences produced by FLUX.1 Kontext, Gen-4, and GPT-Image-high. We additionally compute the cosine similarity of AuraFace [10, 22] embeddings between the input and images generated via successive edits, highlighting the slower drift of FLUX.1 Kontext relative to competing methods. Consistency is essential: marketing needs stable brand characters, media production demands asset continuity, and e-commerce must preserve product details. Applications enabled by FLUX.1 Kontext’s reliable consistency are shown in Fig. 10 and Fig. 11.
items.zh: 在多次编辑中保持角色和物体的一致性对于品牌敏感和叙事应用至关重要。当前最先进的方法存在明显的视觉漂移：每次编辑后角色失去身份，物体失去关键特征。在图 12 中，我们展示了 FLUX.1 Kontext、Gen-4 和 GPT-Image-high 在编辑序列中产生的角色身份漂移。我们还计算了输入图像与通过连续编辑生成的图像之间 AuraFace [10, 22] 嵌入的余弦相似度，突显了 FLUX.1 Kontext 相对于竞争方法的较慢漂移。一致性至关重要：营销需要稳定的品牌角色，媒体制作需要资产连续性，电子商务必须保留产品细节。FLUX.1 Kontext 可靠一致性所支持的应用如图 10 和图 11 所示。

items.capEn: (b) “make me a matching flower vase, product photography set against a white wall, sitting on a wooden desk, put some nice flowers in it”
items.capZh: (b) “给我做一个配套的花瓶，产品摄影，背景为白墙，放在木桌上，里面插一些漂亮的花”

items.capEn: (c) “change the vase base color to black”

Figure 12: Iterative editing based on the same starting image with the same prompts and different models (top: FLUX.1 Kontext, middle: gpt-image-1, bottom: Runway Gen4). Below are face similarity scores between the edited images and the edited images at different steps. For the last edit ("Add sunglasses"), a relative drop is expected due to partial exclusion of the face.
items.capZh: 图 12：基于相同起始图像、相同提示和不同模型（上：FLUX.1 Kontext，中：gpt-image-1，下：Runway Gen4）的迭代编辑。下方是编辑图像与不同步骤编辑图像之间的人脸相似度分数。对于最后一次编辑（“添加太阳镜”），由于部分遮挡面部，预计会有相对下降。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Text-to-image samples by FLUX.1 Kontext with low bakeyness, diverse styles, and accurate typography.
items.capZh: 图14：FLUX.1 Kontext的文本到图像样本，具有低烘焙度、多样风格和准确排版。

items.en: FLUX.1 Kontext supports several applications beyond standard generation. Style reference (SREF), first popularized by Midjourney [35] and commonly implemented via IP-Adapters [58], enables style transfer from reference images while maintaining semantic control (see Section 4.2). Additionally, the model supports intuitive editing through visual cues, responding to geometric markers like red ellipses to guide targeted modifications. It also provides sophisticated text editing capabilities, including logo refinement, spelling corrections, and style adaptations while preserving surrounding context. We demonstrate style reference in Fig. 5 and visual cue-based editing in Fig. 13.
items.zh: FLUX.1 Kontext支持标准生成之外的多种应用。风格参考（SREF）最初由Midjourney [35]推广，通常通过IP-Adapter [58]实现，能够在保持语义控制的同时从参考图像进行风格迁移（见第4.2节）。此外，该模型通过视觉线索支持直观编辑，响应红色椭圆等几何标记以指导目标修改。它还提供复杂的文本编辑能力，包括标志优化、拼写校正和风格适配，同时保留周围上下文。我们在图5中展示了风格参考，在图13中展示了基于视觉线索的编辑。

items.en: We introduced FLUX.1 Kontext, a flow matching model that combines in-context image generation and editing in a single framework. Through simple sequence concatenation and training recipes, FLUX.1 Kontext achieves state-of-the-art performance while addressing key limitations such as character drift during multi-turn edits, slow inference, and low output quality. Our contributions include a unified architecture that handles multiple processing tasks, superior character consistency across iterations, interactive speed, and KontextBench: A real-world benchmark with 1 026 image-prompt pairs. Our extensive evaluations reveal that FLUX.1 Kontext is comparable to proprietary systems while enabling fast, multi-turn creative workflows.
items.zh: 我们介绍了FLUX.1 Kontext，一个流匹配模型，将上下文图像生成和编辑统一在单一框架中。通过简单的序列拼接和训练策略，FLUX.1 Kontext实现了最先进的性能，同时解决了关键限制，如多轮编辑中的字符漂移、推理速度慢和输出质量低。我们的贡献包括：统一架构处理多种任务、跨迭代的卓越字符一致性、交互速度，以及KontextBench：一个包含1026个图像-提示对的真实世界基准。我们的广泛评估表明，FLUX.1 Kontext与专有系统相当，同时支持快速的多轮创意工作流。

items.en: Limitations. FLUX.1 Kontext exhibits a few limitations in its current implementation. Excessive multi-turn editing can introduce visual artifacts that degrade image quality, see Figure˜15. The model occasionally fails to follow instructions accurately, ignoring specific prompt requirements. In addition, the distillation process can introduce visual artifacts that impact the fidelity of the output.
items.zh: 局限性。FLUX.1 Kontext在当前实现中存在一些局限性。过多的多轮编辑可能引入视觉伪影，降低图像质量，见图15。模型有时无法准确遵循指令，忽略特定的提示要求。此外，蒸馏过程可能引入影响输出保真度的视觉伪影。

items.en: Future work should focus on extending to multiple image inputs, further scaling, and reducing inference latency to unlock real-time applications. A natural extension of our approach is to include edits in the video domain. Most importantly, reducing degradation during multi-turn editing would enable infinitely fluid content creation. The release of FLUX.1 Kontext and KontextBench provides a solid foundation and a comprehensive evaluation framework to drive unified image generation and editing.
items.zh: 未来工作应聚焦于扩展到多图像输入、进一步Scaling（规模扩张）以及减少推理延迟，以实现实时应用。我们方法的一个自然扩展是将编辑纳入视频领域。最重要的是，减少多轮编辑中的退化将实现无限流畅的内容创作。FLUX.1 Kontext和KontextBench的发布为统一图像生成和编辑提供了坚实基础和全面评估框架。

items.capEn: (b) “The woman is now wearing a green dress, the painting in the back now shows a beach scene, the text on the TV says "Kontext" now”
items.capZh: (b) “该女士现在穿着绿色连衣裙，背景中的画现在显示海滩场景，电视上的文字现在显示‘Kontext’”

items.capEn: (c) “…green dress…beach scene…tv says "Kontext"…table cloth is also now red and the lighting is a bit warmer”
items.capZh: (c) “…绿色连衣裙…海滩场景…电视显示‘Kontext’…桌布现在也是红色，灯光更暖一些”

items.en: and we sample tt from a Logit-Normal Distribution [12]: p​(t)=exp⁡(−0.5⋅(logit​(t)−μ)2/σ2)σ​2​π⋅(1−t)⋅tp(t)=\frac{\exp{(-0.5\cdot(\mathrm{logit}(t)-\mu)^{2}/\sigma^{2})}}{\sigma\sqrt{2\pi}\cdot(1-t)\cdot t}, where logit​(t)=log⁡t1−t\mathrm{logit}(t)=\log\frac{t}{1-t}. full.sec: A.2 Expressing shifting of the timestep schedule via the Logit-Normal Distribution
full.secZh: A.2 通过Logit-正态分布表达时间步调度的偏移

items.en: Previous work on high-resolution image synthesis introduced an additional shift of the timestep sampling (and, equivalently, the log-SNR schedule) via a parameter α\alpha [12, 18]. Esser et al. [12] empirically demonstrated that α=3.0\alpha=3.0 worked best when increasing the image resolution from 2562256^{2} to 102421024^{2}. In the following, we show that this shifting can be expressed via the Logit-Normal Distribution.
items.zh: 先前关于高分辨率图像合成的工作通过参数 α\alpha 引入了时间步采样的额外偏移（等价地，对数信噪比调度）[12, 18]。Esser 等人 [12] 通过实验证明，当图像分辨率从 2562256^{2} 增加到 102421024^{2} 时，α=3.0\alpha=3.0 效果最佳。在下文中，我们表明这种偏移可以通过 Logit-Normal 分布来表示。

items.en: Consider the log-SNR of a rectified flow forward process with μ=0\mu=0 and σ=1\sigma=1:
items.zh: 考虑 μ=0\mu=0 且 σ=1\sigma=1 的整流流前向过程的对数信噪比：

items.en: where logit​(t)∼𝒩​(0,1)\mathrm{logit}(t)\sim\mathcal{N}(0,1). Expressing the log-SNR for arbitrary μ\mu and σ\sigma gives
items.zh: 其中 logit​(t)∼𝒩​(0,1)\mathrm{logit}(t)\sim\mathcal{N}(0,1)。将任意 μ\mu 和 σ\sigma 的对数信噪比表示为

items.en: The α\alpha-shifted log-SNR [12, 18] is obtained as
items.zh: α\alpha 偏移的对数信噪比 [12, 18] 可表示为

items.en: Comparing Equation˜9 and Equation˜10, we identify μ=log⁡α\mu=\log\alpha for σ=1.0\sigma=1.0, i.e. a shift of α=3.0\alpha=3.0 would correspond to a logit-normal distribution with μ=log⁡3.0=1.0986\mu=\log 3.0=1.0986 and σ=1.0\sigma=1.0.
items.zh: 比较公式 9 和公式 10，我们识别出当 σ=1.0\sigma=1.0 时 μ=log⁡α\mu=\log\alpha，即 α=3.0\alpha=3.0 的偏移对应于 μ=log⁡3.0=1.0986\mu=\log 3.0=1.0986 且 σ=1.0\sigma=1.0 的 logit-normal 分布。

items.en: We can further express the shifted log-SNR as a function of shifted timesteps t′t^{\prime}
items.zh: 我们还可以将偏移后的对数信噪比表示为偏移时间步 t′t^{\prime} 的函数

items.en: For σ=1.0\sigma=1.0 and μ=log⁡α\mu=\log\alpha this recovers the redistribution function for the timesteps proposed in [12] t′=α​t1+(α−1)​tt^{\prime}=\frac{\alpha t}{1+(\alpha-1)t}, as expected. This generalized shifting formula 9 can be useful both for training and via 12 for inference.
items.zh: 对于 σ=1.0\sigma=1.0 且 μ=log⁡α\mu=\log\alpha，这恢复了文献 [12] 中提出的时间步重分布函数 t′=α​t1+(α−1)​tt^{\prime}=\frac{\alpha t}{1+(\alpha-1)t}，符合预期。这个广义偏移公式 9 对训练和通过公式 12 进行推理都很有用。

items.en: We compare our VAE with related models using three reconstruction metrics, namely, SSIM, PSNR, and the Perceptual Distance (PDist) in VGG [52] feature space. All metrics are computed over 4 096 random ImageNet evaluation images at resolution 256×256256\times 256. Table˜1 shows the mean and the standard deviation over the 4 096 inputs.
items.zh: 我们使用三个重建指标比较我们的 VAE 与相关模型，即 SSIM、PSNR 和 VGG [52] 特征空间中的感知距离（PDist）。所有指标均在 4 096 张随机 ImageNet 评估图像上计算，分辨率为 256×256256\times 256。表 1 显示了 4 096 个输入的平均值和标准差。
